briefdescription.para: Symbol has finite bounds
Symbol is unbounded
Boundedness not determined
Boundedness classification for symbols.
Complex numbers (default, least specific)
Real numbers
Rational numbers
Integers
Non-negative integers (0, 1, 2, ...)
Positive integers (1, 2, 3, ...)
Mathematical domain hierarchy (least specific → most specific). Complex ⊃ Real ⊃ Rational ⊃ Integer ⊃ Natural ⊃ PositiveInt
严格大于
大于等于
严格小于
小于等于
不等式类型
字典序
分次逆字典序
分次字典序
分次逆字典序（同 GrevLex）
单项式序的类型枚举
Even integer
Odd integer
Parity not determined
Integer parity classification.
Sign classification for symbols and expressions.
闭式公式求解
预处理（化简、换元等）
超越方程求解
数值迭代求解
以 RootOf 表达式表示
求解策略枚举，标识所使用的求解方法。
Property definitely holds
Property definitely does not hold
Property cannot be determined
Tri-state logic value for property queries.
匹配结果映射，通配符名称 → 绑定的表达式
单项式类型，以整数向量表示各变量的指数
预定义的大素数表，用于模运算多素数方案
预定义素数表的长度

briefdescription.para: 判断 divisor 是否整除 target

briefdescription.para: Helper: extract a numeric double value from an Endpoint.

briefdescription.para: Helper: check if a NumberNode holds an even integer value.
Helper: check if an exponent NumberNode is exactly -1 (for division detection).
Helper: check if an exponent NumberNode is exactly 2 (for squaring detection).
判断素数 p 是否为"好素数"（不整除任何首项系数）

simplesect.para: 若 p 不整除任何系数则返回 true

briefdescription.para: Helper: check if a NumberNode holds an integer value.

detaileddescription.para: Works for BigInt (always integer), Rational (if denominator == 1), and double (if finite and equal to its floor).

briefdescription.para: Helper: check if a NumberNode holds a positive integer value (> 0).

求解超越方程（三角、指数、对数类型）。

simplesect.para: 所有根的符号表达式列表

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &expr, const std::string &var, int depth)
memberdef.name: solve_transcendental_impl

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &equation, const std::string &variable, const AssumptionContext *ctx=nullptr)
memberdef.name: solve_with_assumptions

briefdescription.para: Solve an equation with assumption-based domain filtering.

detaileddescription.para: Calls the existing SymbolicExpr::solve() to compute all solutions, then applies domain filtering based on the variable's declared domain in the AssumptionContext. Solutions that violate the domain constraint are excluded.

Domain filtering rules:
Real: exclude solutions containing sqrt(-1) or non-real numeric values
PositiveInt: exclude non-integer or <= 0 solutions
NonNegative (Natural): exclude solutions evaluating to < 0

parameterdescription.para: The equation to solve (equal to zero, or RelationalNode)
The variable name to solve for
Optional assumption context; if nullptr, all solutions returned unfiltered

memberdef.definition: std::vector< std::pair< Polynomial< Rational >, int > > lamina::square_free_factorization
